creator: sheldonh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed with a few changes: 
* You introduced trailing whitespace in hunk 1. 
* Rather than removing 4.0-current, fix it and add 3.x.  
* Rather than removing </sect> tags, add them (it's bad style 
to ommit them, so why follow the bad style of the preceding 
entries?). 
* Improved (I think) the wording of your new entry. 
Thanks!
